name: How is fault decided in respiratory illness workers comp cases?
description: No-fault system—benefits if job-caused, no blame needed.[3]

mainEntity.name: How is fault decided in respiratory illness workers comp cases?

acceptedAnswer.text: No-fault system—benefits if job-caused, no blame needed.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Workers' comp is **no-fault**—you get benefits regardless of employer negligence, as long as job-related.[1][3]

Fault matters only for third-party suits or piercing exclusivity (rare).[3]

**Key factors:**
- Medical causation
- Exposure occurrence at work
- No intentional self-harm

**Practical guidance:** Focus on proof, not blame; lawyer navigates exceptions.
No-fault simplifies claims.
